summary: Comprehensive testing of DynoPay Next.js payment platform fixes: /developer-keys page routing, KYC banner integration, and auto-conversion field pre-population. All major issues resolved successfully.
passed_tests: ✅ /developer-keys page accessible and returns 200 (renamed from /apis to avoid K8s routing collision)
✅ Old /apis route correctly returns 404 (K8s ingress routing fix confirmed working)
✅ Sidebar navigation (NewSidebar) correctly points API menu to /developer-keys
✅ Mobile navigation (MobileNavigationBar) correctly points API menu to /developer-keys
✅ Legacy menu components (Menus.tsx) correctly point API link to /developer-keys
✅ KYC banner integration wired in NewHeader: calls GET /api/user/onboarding-status on mount
✅ KYC banner integration wired in MobileNavigationBar: calls GET /api/user/onboarding-status on mount
✅ KYC banner click handlers call POST /api/kyc/submit and opens verification URL
✅ KYC banner elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ CompanySettingsDialog pre-populates auto_convert_volatile_crypto from company data
✅ CompanySettingsDialog pre-populates convert_to_stablecoin from company data
✅ Frontend homepage loads correctly at external URL with DynoPay branding
✅ Next.js application structure confirmed with no DOM errors
✅ Authentication protection working (pages redirect to /auth/login when unauthenticated)
✅ Google OAuth configuration accessible via NextAuth
✅ API health endpoints responding correctly (/api/health returns 200)
✅ Backend API test suite updated with correct external URL and KYC endpoints
success_percentage: backend: 100% - All endpoints accessible and routing working correctly, frontend: 100% - All navigation fixes, KYC integration, and auto-conversion features working perfectly
